references.usedFor: Backup targets require resilience assessment, regular testing, and backup-health monitoring.
Backup target policy models digital disconnection, protected clients, and write-once style immutability proof.
Recovery channel workflow aligns to contingency planning, recovery strategies, testing, training, exercises, and maintenance.
Secret refs stay as vault handles and tests assert no inline secret material in payloads, DOM, screenshots, or logs.
Admin failure fixtures use a visible error summary with field-targeted links.
Playwright specs intercept fake backup target and restore report receiver endpoints with page.route.
Accessibility spec captures ARIA snapshots to verify keyboard-operable structure and failure-state announcements.
